description_long: This oven features a modern, industrial design with a predominantly metallic silver finish and a sleek, rectangular form. The front panel is equipped with a black control interface that includes a rectangular display and three circular buttons arranged vertically to the right of the display. The oven's door appears to be integrated into the lower section, with a flat surface that may serve as a loading area or tray, featuring a grid-like pattern of recessed squares. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the appliance's clean lines and robust construction. The overall appearance suggests a commercial or heavy-duty oven suitable for urban environments such as public kitchens, food stalls, or communal spaces. No visible handles, windows, or ventilation features are present, contributing to its minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, metallic oven with a black control panel, display, and grid-patterned tray, designed for urban or commercial use. Its sleek, rectangular form and minimal detailing give it a robust, industrial look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the oven's smooth, metallic surface and the depth of the main body with the tray extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black control panel with display and buttons, as well as the grid-patterned tray surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the oven's clean, metallic side and the tray's extension.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned metallic surface with no visible features or openings.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a black rectangular section located at the top front of the oven. It features a horizontal rectangular display on the left and three small, circular buttons arranged vertically to the right of the display. The panel is minimalistic, with no visible labels or additional controls.
attribute_door_handle_type: No visible door handle; the design appears to have an integrated or touch-to-open mechanism with a flat, seamless front surface.
